project.name: electron-validation-test
project.description: Simple Electron counter app for system validation

requirements.title: Main Window Display
requirements.description: Application displays a main window with title 'Counter App'

requirements.title: Counter Display
requirements.description: A large counter number is displayed in the center of the window

requirements.title: Increment Button
requirements.description: A button labeled '+' increments the counter when clicked

requirements.title: Decrement Button
requirements.description: A button labeled '-' decrements the counter when clicked

requirements.title: Reset Button
requirements.description: A button labeled 'Reset' resets the counter to zero
